categories.name: SO, WHAT HAVE YOU BEEN UP TO?

questions.clue:
[IMAGE CLUE]
A picture of your new dog? Uh, that's this type of canine that's big in LA canyons. Is it in your house?
On coach Lionel Scaloni's staff for this team at the 2022 World Cup? I thought I saw you celebrating after the final
Wait, you became the leader of this Cabinet department that oversees the Transportation Security Admin.? When was that?!
In 2022 you were on the U.S. team that made the first nuclear this reaction resulting in a net energy gain... congrats!
Becoming fluent in this artificial language constructed by a Polish oculist? Fabela! (Fabulous!)
Now in the 2nd generation, AirPods Pro
LeBron Witness 7 basketball shoes
The Butterfinger Blizzard & the Peanut Buster Parfait
The K-Mini coffee maker, perfect for dorm rooms
The Les Paul electric guitar, since 1952
Odd or erratic, like a wacky millionaire, or deviating from circular, like the orbits of some heavenly bodies

Careful! It's the 7-letter adjective for the symbol seen here
Stern or stark; it describes an academy in the title of the fifth book in "A Series of Unfortunate Events"
A kind of deep chasm gives us this adjective that can mean "bottomless" or "profound" but also "incompetently bad"
Meaning displaying the colors of the rainbow, it comes from the personification of the rainbow
TikTok is replete with videos of this game from childhood where only one seat remains when the song stops for the last time
The 12-3-30 viral workout had people walking on this at a 12% incline at 3 mph for 30 minutes

A big food trend a couple of years back was this fluffy baked item made with egg whites, sugar & cornstarch
Sadly, in 2022 it was a final "no bones" for TikTok star Noodle, this breed of dog, who passed away at 14

Famous for his silent reaction videos & spoofs, he dethroned Charli D'Amelio as the most-followed TikTok star
Go stargazing at the Morehead Planetarium, one of the nation's largest, in this 2-word North Carolina city
The son of a business manager at the University of Mississippi, this novelist was laid to rest in Oxford Memorial Cemetery
Georgia, not Greece, should be on your mind with this city, known for bands like the confusingly named of Montreal
Boulder, Colorado is a mecca for atmospheric research & this 4-letter cyclone-tracking agency has a lab there
questions.answer: NOAA (the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration)

categories.name: THE REST OF THE WORLD IN 2018 & '19

questions.clue: The joint European & Japanese space mission Bepicolombo was launched to study this innermost planet
Reports of these man-made fliers near London's Gatwick Airport led to the cancellation or diversion of about 1,000 flights
Hopes of peace were raised when North Korean leader Kim Jong-un entered this buffer area to meet with South Korean Pres. Moon
In June 2018 Saudi Arabia lifted a longtime ban allowing women to legally do this for the first time since 1957
Turkish troops began 2018 with an offensive to take Kurdish territory in the north of this war-torn nation

final.clue: In office from 2022, the president of this country has taken so many foreign trips a play on his name is "Ferdinand Magellan Jr."
